title: Almost Vanilla Potions
description: The Minecraft potions with a bit of personality
body:
# Almost Vanilla Potions
### About?
The Minecraft potions are a little confusing, it just changes colors and have the same shape for every type. I tried to "fix" them giving it some unique and recognizable shapes, even though, the objective is to maintain the classic style of Minecraft.
##
### What exactly changed?
All splash, lingering, and normal potions, plus honey and exp bottles.

- Long-duration potions have a red line representing redstone.
- Level 2 potions have the stopper gray.
##
![All Potions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71bd3458559bc4ed8b209888ca837c812dd5f0c6.webp)
_More images on gallery!_
## 
### General questions
**[1] Can I use it for my projects?:** sure, just give the credits if it is public.

**[2] Can you make it for older versions?:** never, I have no idea how to make it, but if someone wants to, do it (with credits)

**[3] Will it be updated?:** probably

**[4] Any mod support?:** none, for now at least 
## 
### Contact
Bug reports, tips, requests, or anything else: almostdelled@gmail.com
## 
### You may also like
I have made other resource packs with the objective of maintaining the Minecraft feeling while changing things up. Check them out!
- [Almost Vanilla Armors](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-armors)

- [Almost Vanilla Tools](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/almost-vanilla-tools)
  
- [Colored Enchantment Levels](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colored-enchantment-levels)
